title: Do you think we will see a sequel
display_title: Do you think we will see a sequel
wikitext:
[]: Do you think we will see a sequel ?             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:31 pm I know we've got movie hype going around and another rerelease on dvd, but do you think we will ever see another series or OVA ? I say no, as much as I'd love to be wrong my gut tells me otherwise. :cry: DD :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:38 pm No doubt about it. It may take 10 years, it may take 100, but there will be a sequel. However, It will not have Anno. All we can do is pray that someone just as good takes over.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:44 pm Dave wrote: No doubt about it. It may take 10 years, it may take 100, but there will be a sequel. However, It will not have Anno. All we can do is pray that someone just as good takes over.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:47 pm That and it must have the original charas in it.....

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:54 pm As long as eva makes money i guss the doors open. Do you think it CAN be done with out anno?

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:57 pm DatDude wrote: As long as eva makes money i guss the doors open. Do you think it CAN be done with out anno?

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sun Aug 08, 2004 6:11 pm Hmmmmm........Lets see.....They just realeased and Anniversary collection, directors cuts, Remastered collection and have a Live Action Movie in the works. I'll let you guys make a conclusion..... THE END

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Aug 08, 2004 6:23 pm Question: Do you think we will see a sequel? Yes, we will see a sequel, and no one is going to notice it.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 6:29 pm Aniversary collection is that the Platinum series?? Just on the Planium series it wil take 2 years to get all th dvds out

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sun Aug 08, 2004 6:44 pm More like a year and a bit. If there are seven DVDs and new DVDs come out every two months, you'll have six DVDs in a year. One will be released in that "a bit" time frame... thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 6:56 pm Depends if they get it right , I say 2 years for sure and about 3-4 years for the box set

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sun Aug 08, 2004 7:04 pm I say you're full of shit.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 7:10 pm :? :? :? :? Think about it , why would they release the box set before or just after they have release the last edition , it business terms it does make sense , they want to make as much money as possible ( squeezing the market dry) out of the individual dvd's. If they space out the individual dvd's to a 3 - 4 months gap ( which may happen , even though it has been said to be 2 months) they will make more money , plus fix unforseen problems with the dvd's. So dont tell me i am full of shit. I am thinking this through from a business prospective. Not a consumer

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sun Aug 08, 2004 7:22 pm :: points to Eva Monkey like a small child :: But he said it'd be out in about a year! Anyways, on topic... yes, the potential for a sequel is there. If there really WILL be one is questionable.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Aug 08, 2004 7:31 pm The real question here is will the sequel do justice to the original

[]:             Quote Post by Xenogil » Sun Aug 08, 2004 9:15 pm I highly doubt that they are going to make a sequel to Evangelion. Personally, I don't see what they would make a sequel of.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr.Guy » Sun Aug 08, 2004 9:18 pm I think it's possible they'll do a sequel. But I think the real question is, would a sequel really be good? The Evas are gone, the angels are gone, Nerv's gone, SEELE will probably stay in the sea of LCL. What's going to drive the plot? Sure, they could use Shinji and Asuka and how everyone rebuilds after EoE. But that wouldn't do it for me really. You take away the Evas and Angels and you don't really have Evangelion anymore :? If I was in charge, I'd have a short OVA, like Endless Waltz. Maybe just showing a little past "I need you". Not something big, but something that doesn't leave so much of a cliffhanger. IMO, that's what would be best. Of course, if they do make an Eva sequel, you can bet I'll still watch it :P

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Aug 08, 2004 9:20 pm Same here. Actully I'd like an Endless Waltz like thing. It would probably either show what happened to Shinji, Asuka and the rest of Humanity after TI. I would buy it definitly though.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Aug 08, 2004 9:21 pm Hm... an OAV on the events leading up to, during, and after second impact would be quite interesting in my opinion. I attempted to make a movie script based on this premise once but it wasn't very good... though my scripting skills aren't exactly very good either.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sun Aug 08, 2004 10:21 pm I think that the best they can do is a PRECUEL Because the end of evangelion was THE END !!! It would be nice to know all the story of seele, Adam, Lilith, and that Ancient civilization thing... Dont you think? :roll:
summary:
[]: Do you think we will see a sequel ?             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:31 pm I know we've got movie hype going around and another rerelease on dvd, but do you think we will ever see another series or OVA ? I say no, as much as I'd love to be wrong my gut tells me otherwise. :cry: DD :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Aug 08, 2004 5:38 pm No
